name: kbridge-four-bar-overlay
description: KinematicBridge Step-0 isolation, Run C. OVERLAY at doc=cm. PRIMARY preview is the imported Inventor mechanism geometry at rest (Mechanism out 1 → Custom Preview) overlaid with the CPig skeleton (design pose). A separate Inventor Animate(Time) layer (contrasting tint) is available to scrub the Inventor animation. cm is the importer's native unit; CPig matches via the unit-aware preview (CPig ADR 0005). At rest the imported mechanism and the CPig skeleton co-locate (kf0 seed). DEFERRED: a CPig animation scrub layer (blocked on B-cand-008 sweep stagnation) and CPig body geometry (skeleton only). Slop fixture: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/four-bar-overlay.canary.slop.json. Requires the KinematicImporter .gha loaded.

setup.vlmDescription: Two representations of the SAME four-bar linkage shown together in one Rhino viewport: (1) solid shaded CAD parts (KinematicImporter) and (2) a skeleton of colored coordinate-frame triads and link polylines (CPig). A correct result has both at the SAME physical scale and roughly co-located / overlapping. Report a problem if one is dramatically larger than the other (e.g. about 10x), or if the two sit far apart as two separate clusters instead of overlapping.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Solid four-bar CAD parts and a four-bar frame-triad skeleton in one viewport, same scale, overlapping/co-located. Flag a ~10x size mismatch or two far-apart clusters.

checkpoints.name: front
checkpoints.description: Front view of the same overlay: solid parts and skeleton at the same scale, overlapping. Flag a ~10x size mismatch or a large positional offset between the two.
